ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of the permission (e.g., Account, Asset) */,
  "grantable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission can be granted to others */,
  "only_for_tx_creator" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is only for the transaction creator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the permission */,
  "note" TEXT /* Any notes or special considerations for the permission */,
  "related_command" TEXT /* Link to the related command documentation */,
  "granularity_level" TEXT /* Indicates the level of granularity for the permission (e.g., Account, Asset, Transaction) */,
  "revocable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission can be revoked */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* The date from which the permission is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* The date until which the permission is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* The date from which the role-permission mapping is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* The date until which the role-permission mapping is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain the account belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the account (e.g., Active, Suspended, Deleted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address associated with the account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number associated with the account */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* The date of the last logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_roles" (
  "account_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account-role mapping */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* The date from which the account-role mapping is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* The date until which the account-role mapping is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_roles_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain the asset belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the asset (e.g., Active, Inactive, Deleted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the asset */,
  "owner_account_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the account that owns the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_owner_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_assets" (
  "account_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account-asset mapping */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the asset owned by the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction involving this asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the account-asset relationship (e.g., Active, Inactive, Transferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_assets_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account performing the action */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset involved in the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, transfer, set detail) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* The status of the transaction (e.g., Success, Failed, Pending) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
